message:
refactor: extract AiCardTab subcomponent from CardFactoryModal.tsx (#8608) [part 6] (#8908)

Move the AI Create tab content (Tier-1 declarative + Tier-2 custom-code
generation flows) into its own file, `cardFactoryAiTab.tsx`. The component
was previously defined inline at the bottom of CardFactoryModal.tsx and
is only consumed in one place via the existing tab JSX.

This removes a number of imports from CardFactoryModal.tsx that were only
used by the inline subcomponent (AiGenerationPanel, T1Preview/T2Preview,
CARD_T1_SYSTEM_PROMPT/CARD_T2_SYSTEM_PROMPT, validateT1Result/
validateT2Result, AiCardT1Result/AiCardT2Result, AiMode), keeping the
parent file's import surface focused on the modal shell + declarative/
code-tab logic.

Additionally promotes two magic numbers in the extracted component to
named constants (DEFAULT_T1_LIMIT, DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH).

Zero behavior change: the AiCardTab is invoked exactly the same way
from the parent modal, with the same `onCardCreated` callback prop.

Reduces CardFactoryModal.tsx from 1356 to 1238 LOC (-118).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

validateT1Result, - validateT2Result, - type AiCardT1Result, - type AiCardT2Result, - type AiMode } from './cardFactoryAiTypes' +import { AiCardTab } from './cardFactoryAiTab' import { validateT1AssistResult, validateT2AssistResult, @@ -1236,121 +1230,3 @@ export function CardFactoryModal({ isOpen, onClose, onCardCreated, embedded = fa ) } - dataSource: 'static', - staticData: result.staticData || [], - columns: result.columns, - layout: result.layout || 'list', - searchFields: result.searchFields || result.columns.map(c => c.field), - defaultLimit: result.defaultLimit || 5 } - @@ -0,0 +1,144 @@ +import { useState } from 'react' +import { Layers, Code } from 'lucide-react' +import { cn } from '../../lib/cn' +import { saveDynamicCard } from '../../lib/dynamic-cards' +import { compileCardCode } from '../../lib/dynamic-cards/compiler' +import type { + DynamicCardDefinition, + DynamicCardDefinition_T1 } from '../../lib/dynamic-cards/types' +import { registerDynamicCardType } from '../cards/cardRegistry' +import { AiGenerationPanel } from './AiGenerationPanel' +import { CARD_T1_SYSTEM_PROMPT, CARD_T2_SYSTEM_PROMPT } from '../../lib/ai/prompts' +import { T1Preview, T2Preview } from './cardFactoryPreviews' +import { + validateT1Result, + validateT2Result, + type AiCardT1Result, + type AiCardT2Result, + type AiMode } from './cardFactoryAiTypes' + +const DEFAULT_T1_LIMIT = 5 // Default row limit for tier-1 cards when AI omits defaultLimit +const DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH = 6 // Default grid width (out of 12) when AI omits defaultWidth + +/** + * AI tab content for the Card Factory modal. + * + * Lets users describe a card in natural language and have an AI assistant + * generate either a Tier-1 declarative definition or a Tier-2 custom-code + * React component. Wraps {@link AiGenerationPanel} for both flows and + * persists the generated card via {@link saveDynamicCard} + + * {@link registerDynamicCardType}. + */ +export function AiCardTab({ onCardCreated }: { onCardCreated: (id: string) => void }) { + const [aiMode, setAiMode] = useState('tier1') + + const handleSaveT1 = (result: AiCardT1Result) => { + const id = `dynamic_${Date.now()}` + const now = new Date().toISOString() + + const cardDef: DynamicCardDefinition_T1 = { + dataSource: 'static', + staticData: result.staticData || [], + columns: result.columns, + layout: result.layout || 'list', + searchFields: result.searchFields || result.columns.map(c => c.field), + defaultLimit: result.defaultLimit || DEFAULT_T1_LIMIT } + + const def: DynamicCardDefinition = { + id, + title: result.title, + tier: 'tier1', + description: result.description || undefined, + defaultWidth: result.defaultWidth || DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH, + createdAt: now, + updatedAt: now, + cardDefinition: cardDef } + + saveDynamicCard(def) + registerDynamicCardType(id, result.defaultWidth || DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH) + onCardCreated(id) + } + + const handleSaveT2 = async (result: AiCardT2Result) => { + const compileResult = await compileCardCode(result.sourceCode) + if (compileResult.error) { + throw new Error(`Compile error: ${compileResult.error}`) + } + + const id = `dynamic_${Date.now()}` + const now = new Date().toISOString() + + const def: DynamicCardDefinition = { + id, + title: result.title, + tier: 'tier2', + description: result.description || undefined, + defaultWidth: result.defaultWidth || DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH, + createdAt: now, + updatedAt: now, + sourceCode: result.sourceCode, + compiledCode: compileResult.code! } + + saveDynamicCard(def) + registerDynamicCardType(id, result.defaultWidth || DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH) + onCardCreated(id) + } + + return ( +
+ {/* Mode toggle */} +
+ +
+ + +
+
+ + {/* AI Generation Panel */} + {aiMode === 'tier1' ? ( + + systemPrompt={CARD_T1_SYSTEM_PROMPT} + placeholder="Describe the card you want, e.g., 'A card showing deployment status across clusters with name, namespace, replicas, and status columns'" + missionTitle="AI Card Generation (Declarative)" + validateResult={validateT1Result} + renderPreview={(result) => } + onSave={handleSaveT1} + saveLabel="Create Declarative Card" + /> + ) : ( + + systemPrompt={CARD_T2_SYSTEM_PROMPT} + placeholder="Describe the card you want, e.g., 'A card with animated donut chart showing cluster health percentages with color-coded segments'" + missionTitle="AI Card Generation (Custom Code)" + validateResult={validateT2Result} + renderPreview={(result) => } + onSave={handleSaveT2} + saveLabel="Create Custom Code Card" + /> + )} +
+ ) +}
